name: login-flow
description: Agent navigates to a login page and verifies it can detect login fields.

setup.pageContent: Welcome back! Please sign in to your account.

steps.expect: response => [ {ok: response.ok === true, message: 'should navigate to login page'} ]
response => [ {ok: response.ok === true, message: 'inspect should succeed'}, {ok: response.context && Array.isArray(response.context.controls), message: 'should return controls array'} ]
steps.note: Page context includes forms/controls so agent can find login fields
